approved_decisions.decision: No LOWESS; raw causal BIS only.
Recent dose is completed intervals in (t-60,t].
Reward alpha is 1.0 and uses latent endpoint BIS only.
Zero-drug reset, zero drug histories, unavailable BIS prehistory.
Scientific invalidity terminates; configured horizon truncates.
Synthetic default horizon is configurable 3600 seconds.
Action is propofol mg per next 10 seconds, [0,27.7], rate=dose*6.
Finite action is clipped once with raw/applied diagnostics.
Synthetic deterministic right-continuous remifentanil schedules only.
Observation age cap 30 seconds; P0 <=30, P1 <=20.
Female=0, male=1; unsupported sex errors; S0=34, S1=42.

scope_note: Approvals apply only to the synthetic Stage II core, not final PPO training or evaluation.
